title: Anthropic is Coming to Bengaluru!
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

Huge news for India's tech ecosystem! Anthropic, the Amazon-backed AI company behind Claude, is opening its first-ever India office right here in Bengaluru in early 2026. This move places a key global AI player directly in our city! Co-founder Dario Amodei met with PM Modi this week to discuss their commitment to building responsible AI for India, focusing on growth in sectors like education, healthcare, and Indic languages. This move solidifies Bengaluru as a global hub for the future of AI. What are your thoughts on this expansion?
